basics.name: Yanis Bardes
basics.summary: PhD student in Artificial Intelligence at Université Paris-Saclay (Lincoln lab). Research focused on real-time waste detection via drone using federated learning and multi-objective optimization. Also teaching Mathematics, AI, and MLOps at École Centrale d'Electronique.

work.summary: Research on real-time and continuous waste detection by drone via federated learning and multi-objective optimization. MVA Master at ENS Paris-Saclay (LLMs, Detection Theory, Convex Optimization, Distributed Computing).
highlights: Real-time waste detection by UAV using federated learning and multi-objective optimization
MVA courses: Large Language Models, Detection Theory, Convex Optimization, Distributed Computing

work.summary: Teaching Mathematics (Prépa, bac+1), Artificial Intelligence (Engineering cycle, bac+5), and MLOps (MSc AI, bac+5).
Data collection and preparation for training language models for the Moroccan dialect. LLM training for Moroccan dialect (data and model available at atlasai.com).
highlights: Data retrieval and preparation for Moroccan dialect LLM training

work.summary: Generative AI: Multi-Modal Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) — patented. Document structuring by AI. CI/CD deployments on Azure DevOps.
highlights: Multi-Modal RAG pipeline (LLM, embedding model, vector database, inference engine) — patented
AI document structuring via OCR and LLM
Parallelization of OCR and structuring pipelines
CI/CD deployment on Azure DevOps with Docker and monitoring

publications.name: Federated Learning for UAV Perception Task: A Survey
publications.summary: Survey on federated learning approaches for UAV (drone) perception tasks.

portfolio.name: NASDAQ Closing Price Prediction
portfolio.description: Time series model for predicting NASDAQ closing price. Kaggle silver medal, top 4%. [PyTorch, LightGBM, k-Fold]

portfolio.name: ASL to Text Video Translation
portfolio.description: Model to transcribe American Sign Language (ASL) from video to text. Kaggle competition by Google, top 4%. [TensorFlow, TFLite, MediaPipe, Conformers, OpenCV]

portfolio.name: Real-time CV Search Platform
portfolio.description: Production platform for real-time CV search based on semantic retrieval. [Redis, Docker, Weaviate, ETL, Grafana, Kubernetes, Amazon S3]
